message:
feat(daemon): add status change callback to State

Add StatusChangeCallback mechanism to State so external components can
be notified when a task's status changes. This enables the dashboard's
StatusBroadcaster to receive real-time status updates.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
